# Metaphors

## MP1 — GRC as Plumbing

Use for quiet systems that move information reliably without becoming the user's focus.

## MP2 — GRC as Product

Use for product thinking, customer/user orientation, roadmaps, feedback loops, and PMF-style reasoning in GRC.

## MP5 — GRC as Translation Layer

Use for converting framework expectations into operating language and operating behaviour into audit language.

## MP6 — The Human API

Use for team interfaces, handoffs, requests, ownership boundaries, and escalation paths.

## MP9 — GRC as Git

Use for evidence history, reviews, diffs, approvals, traceability, and change over time.

## MP10 — Policy as Interface

Use for policy design as an operating interface between intent, decisions, exceptions, and behaviour.
